key_drivers: Real yields rising +30bps from pre-war levels (TIPS 1.96%) — most bearish factor for equities and gold
Fed hawkish hold with FOMC minutes signaling willingness to hike; zero cuts expected through 2026
US-Iran ceasefire (Apr 7) partially easing geopolitical risk but oil remains near $100; VIX elevated at 21.52
HY credit spreads widened to 305bps (from 267bps pre-war) — most bearish factor for RTY/small caps
GDPNow slowing to 1.3% Q1 2026 (down from 4% in Q3 2025) — stagflationary backdrop
